repo: home-away-fargo (NOTE: root package.json name is still 'hound-3' — clone leftover)
cloneLineage: Cloned from hound-3 (Hound Around Resort). Schema drift vs hound-3 verified by byte-level diff: 3 NEW block types (heroMarquee, expandingCardsRow, spacer), 1 changed block (ctaBanner + alignment field), settings.tsx differs only in initialValue/description strings and ctmScriptUrl field order. All other schema files byte-identical to hound-3.

sanity.studioEmbeddedNotes: Studio exists twice: standalone workspace `studio/` (studio/sanity.config.ts, `sanity deploy`, studioHost from SANITY_STUDIO_STUDIO_HOST) AND embedded at frontend/app/studio/[[...tool]]/page.tsx using frontend/sanity.config.ts which imports schema/structure from ../studio/src. next.config.ts transpilePackages:['studio']. DRIFT vs hound-3: frontend/sanity.config.ts has a proper /services/:slug mainDocument + service locations resolver; studio/sanity.config.ts still carries hound-3's template leftovers (post routes/locations for a nonexistent `post` type, studio/sanity.config.ts:38,77,101).

dependencies.@portabletext/react: NOT A DIRECT DEPENDENCY — imported in 5 components (FaqAccordion, SplitContent, FeatureList, ContentColumns, ContactForm) but resolved transitively via next-sanity

envVars: WEBCAM_AUTH_SECRET (new vs hound-3 — HMAC secret, fallback 'hafh-webcam', frontend/app/api/webcam-auth/route.ts:6-8)

framework.tailwind: 4.x (@tailwindcss/postcss; no tailwind.config.ts — hound-3's leftover v3 config was deleted here)

fields.name: seo
fields.title: SEO & Metadata
fields.notes: DRIFT vs hound-3: populated (metaTitle + metaDescription) on ALL 7 live pages; ogImage and noIndex populated nowhere

fields.name: pageBuilder
fields.title: Page builder
fields.notes: 44 member types (hound-3 had 41; adds heroMarquee, expandingCardsRow, spacer). insertMenu grid view expects /static/page-builder-thumbnails/<type>.webp but only 2 thumbnails exist (callToAction, infoSection) — 42 broken preview images in the Studio insert menu

portableTextConfigs.location: blockContent (shared type: infoSection.content, splitContent.body, faqAccordion.faqs[].answer, featureList.features[].body, contentColumns.columns[].body, contactForm.description) — file studio/src/schemaTypes/objects/blockContent.tsx, byte-identical to hound-3
styles: SANITY DEFAULTS — not restricted in schema (normal, h1–h6, blockquote)
decorators: SANITY DEFAULTS (strong, em, code, underline, strike-through)

fields.href: url, hidden unless linkType href/null, custom validation required-when-href
fields.page: reference to [page] ONLY (note: standalone link object also allows service), hidden unless linkType page, custom validation required-when-page

customBlocks.fields: NONE — no alt/caption fields on schema, but CustomPortableText renderer reads value.alt (always undefined)

portableTextConfigs.rendererFile: SPLIT: frontend/app/components/PortableText.tsx (CustomPortableText) used only by InfoSection.tsx and Cta.tsx; the other 5 sites (SplitContent.tsx, FaqAccordion.tsx, FeatureList.tsx, ContentColumns.tsx, ContactForm.tsx) use BARE <PortableText> from @portabletext/react with NO components map
customComponents: CustomPortableText: types.image → SanityImage width 672 cover rounded; block.h1/h2 → anchor-link headings using _key as fragment id; marks.link → ResolvedLink/linkResolver
Bare renderers: default serializers only — custom link annotation and image blocks are NOT handled (links would render as plain text)
portableTextConfigs.liveDataShape: Benign on this site today: across all live PT content there are ZERO link annotations and ZERO inline images. Styles used: normal, h3 (infoSection), h4 (splitContent). Marks used: strong only. (Verified by GROQ over all page/service docs 2026-07-10.)

portableTextConfigs.location: blockContentTextOnly (used by callToAction.body — block type unused in live data) — file studio/src/schemaTypes/objects/blockContentTextOnly.tsx, byte-identical to hound-3
annotations: SANITY DEFAULT link annotation ({href}) — NOT the custom {linkType,href,page} shape used in blockContent
customComponents: marks.link → ResolvedLink; linkResolver treats missing linkType with href as linkType='href'

annotations.name: link
annotations.fields: same custom link shape as blockContent (linkType/href/page→[page]/openInNewTab)

customComponents: Never rendered as rich text — only flattened via toPlainText() for the meta description
portableTextConfigs.liveDataShape: NOT POPULATED in live data → site-wide meta description is the empty string (layout.tsx:117)

fields: all settings fields via ..., navItems (link deref, children link deref), ctaButton, footerColumns, contactInfo, footerTagline, footerText, footerTextLink, footerBottomLinks, logo, yearEstablished, socialLinks, faviconUrl (favicon.asset->url), ga4MeasurementId, gtmContainerId, googleSiteVerification, ctmScriptUrl (explicit — DRIFT: hound-3 relies on the ... spread for this field), localBusiness
queries.groq: settingsQuery — *[_type == "settings"][0]{..., navItems[]{..., link {..., _type == "link" => {"page": page->slug.current, "pageType": page->_type}}, children[]{..., link {...same}}}, ctaButton {..., link {...same}}, footerColumns[]{..., links[]{..., link {...same}}}, contactInfo, footerTagline, footerText, footerTextLink, footerBottomLinks[]{..., link {...same}}, logo, yearEstablished, socialLinks, "faviconUrl": favicon.asset->url, ga4MeasurementId, gtmContainerId, googleSiteVerification, ctmScriptUrl, localBusiness}

types: page + all 44 block types + service/testimonial/webcam via deref/subquery
fields: _id, _type, name, slug, seo, pageBuilder (full expansion — pageBuilderExpansion fragment, queries.ts:64-288)
queries.groq: getPageQuery — *[_type == 'page' && slug.current == $slug][0]{_id, _type, name, slug, seo, "pageBuilder": pageBuilder[]{..., <per-type conditional expansions: buttons get link deref via buttonFields; PT fields (infoSection.content, faqAccordion.faqs[].answer, contactForm.description, featureList.features[].body, contentColumns.columns[].body) get markDefs link deref; serviceTabs.tabs[]->{_id,title,slug,sticker{asset,alt},shortDescription,tabImage{asset,crop,hotspot,alt},tabCta{...}}; testimonials.reviews[]->{_id,quote,authorName,authorLabel,rating}; heroMarquee primaryCta/secondaryCta deref (NEW vs hound-3, queries.ts:167-171); expandingCardsRow cards[].link deref (NEW, queries.ts:182-188); webcamGrid gets sibling subquery "webcams": *[_type == "webcam" && enabled == true] | order(group asc, sortOrder asc){_id,name,cameraId,group,sortOrder}>}}
sitemapData — *[_type in ["page", "service"] && defined(slug.current)] | order(_type asc) {"slug": slug.current, _type, _updatedAt, "noIndex": seo.noIndex}

fields: _id, _type, title, slug, heading, shortDescription, seo, pageBuilder expansion
queries.groq: getServiceQuery — *[_type == 'service' && slug.current == $slug][0]{_id, _type, title, slug, heading, shortDescription, seo, <pageBuilderExpansion>}

queries.usedBy: frontend/app/layout.tsx (Services nav dropdown injection — INERT on this site: nav label is 'Services and Pricing', injection matches 'Services' exactly; query still runs every request)
queries.groq: servicesNavQuery — *[_type == "service" && defined(slug.current)] | order(title asc) {_id, title, "slug": slug.current}

fetchConfiguration.client: frontend/sanity/lib/client.ts: createClient({useCdn: true, token: SANITY_API_READ_TOKEN (server-only import, throws if missing), stega: {studioUrl}})
fetchConfiguration.live: frontend/sanity/lib/live.ts: defineLive({client, serverToken, browserToken}) — ALL page fetches go through sanityFetch (Live Content API, tag-based auto-revalidation); <SanityLive onError={handleError}/> in layout.tsx:238
fetchConfiguration.staticParams: generateStaticParams uses perspective:'published', stega:false; metadata fetches use stega:false
fetchConfiguration.revalidateRoutes: NOT FOUND — no /api/revalidate webhook route; revalidation is entirely via next-sanity Live
fetchConfiguration.draftMode: frontend/app/api/draft-mode/enable/route.ts via defineEnableDraftMode; disable via server action frontend/app/actions.ts; DraftModeToast + VisualEditing in layout when enabled

imageTransforms.pattern: sanity-image <SanityImage baseUrl=`https://cdn.sanity.io/images/${projectId}/${dataset}/` id={_ref} width={N} crop hotspot mode=cover|contain> — library auto-generates srcset + auto=format. Widths used across components: 24, 28, 42, 80, 120, 128(+height 128), 150, 160, 200, 400, 500, 600, 672, 700, 704, 880, 960, 1000, 1200, 1400
files: all frontend/app/components/sections/*.tsx incl. HeroMarquee (880/400) and ExpandingCardsRow (1200)

imageTransforms.pattern: @sanity/image-url builder.image(ref).width(1600).auto('format').url() + natural dimensions parsed from _ref regex /-(\d+)x(\d+)-/ — lightbox slides (yet-another-react-lightbox)
raw asset URL via GROQ favicon.asset->url (no transforms) — the only asset dereference in queries
files: frontend/app/layout.tsx:121-126 (favicon unset live; frontend/app/icon.svg is the actual favicon)

imageTransforms.pattern: BUG (LIVE on this site): raw asset._ref string emitted as Organization JSON-LD logo — settings.logo IS set here (image-7cce0a50...-289x174-png) so the malformed value ships on every page
files: frontend/app/layout.tsx:184-186 (also latent variant at 84-89, gated behind unset ogImage)

settingsSingleton.documentId: EXPECTED 'siteSettings' (studio/src/structure/index.ts:27 pins S.document().documentId('siteSettings')) but the ONLY live settings document is at UUID 0f056e49-7b45-4c84-84e6-f7ddf3abb654. scripts/migrate-settings-id.js exists at repo root to move it and HAS NOT BEEN RUN. Consequences: Studio 'Site Settings' entry opens an empty new doc; presentation tool mainDocuments '/' filter (_id == 'siteSettings') matches nothing. Frontend unaffected (queries by _type).
settingsSingleton.file: studio/src/schemaTypes/singletons/settings.tsx (differs from hound-3 only in initialValue 'Home Away From Home', footerText description, ctmScriptUrl field position/description)

hardcodedValuesThatBelongHere.value_description: Phone number 701-532-1618 (tel link + display) in the 4+ dogs contact notice
Production domain https://homeawayfargo.com for sitemap URL in robots

ALL calculator pricing (daycare packages, boarding rooms + $39 additional-dog rate, cat pricing, grooming/exit-bath rates) — duplicated with Sanity pricingTable/pricingPageTabs display content; client price corrections have required paired code+CMS edits (Rounds 2 & 4)
Site name 'Home Away From Home' fallbacks and email branding ('Home Away From Home Website' sender), TextLogo wordmark 'Home Away / From Home', webcam password prompt copy
SMS/MMS consent disclosure paragraph (hardcoded JSX below the contact form)
Grooming 'starting at' disclaimer 'Final pricing determined by behavior, coat density, coat condition, and grooming time.' (duplicated with the CMS grooming pricingTable.description)
Cross-site alt-text leakage: 'Boxers Bed & Biscuits' and 'Boxers facility' fallbacks
Contact-form recipient/SMTP config in env (SMTP_HOST/PORT/USER/PASS/FROM, CONTACT_FORM_TO_EMAIL)
Webcam password + operating hours in env (WEBCAM_PASSWORD, WEBCAM_OPEN_HOUR, WEBCAM_CLOSE_HOUR), HMAC secret env WEBCAM_AUTH_SECRET (fallback 'hafh-webcam'), timezone America/Chicago
'Services' nav-label magic string used to inject dropdown children (INERT — live label is 'Services and Pricing')

seoModel.description: Shared `seo` object (metaTitle, metaDescription, ogImage, noIndex) on page + service. Site defaults live in settings (title, description PT [unset], ogImage+metadataBase [unset], googleSiteVerification [unset]). JSON-LD: LocalBusiness (EMITTED — localBusiness populated) + Organization (with raw-_ref logo bug) + WebSite in layout.tsx from settings; FAQPage emitted per faqAccordion block (3 live). Canonicals hardcoded per route ('/', '/[slug]', '/services/[slug]'). Sitemap from sitemapData query (noIndex excluded, /services prefix); robots.ts static with hardcoded homeawayfargo.com. DRIFT vs hound-3: every live page and service HAS seo populated (metaTitle + metaDescription) — and every metaTitle already ends in '| Home Away From Home', which the layout title template '%s | Home Away From Home' duplicates.
fallbackChain: title: page.seo.metaTitle → page.name (service.title) → template '%s | settings.title' → settings.title
description: seo.metaDescription → (service only: heading → shortDescription) → toPlainText(settings.description)
ogImage: seo.ogImage → settings.ogImage (1200x627 fit crop) — both unset everywhere → no OG images site-wide
robots: seo.noIndex → index:false,follow:true; also excluded from sitemap — unset everywhere

schemaDataMismatches: settings singleton lives at UUID 0f056e49-7b45-4c84-84e6-f7ddf3abb654 instead of the 'siteSettings' ID the Studio structure and presentation tool expect — scripts/migrate-settings-id.js written but not run

settings doc lacks: description, favicon, ogImage, footerBottomLinks, footerSticker, ga4MeasurementId, googleSiteVerification (all schema-defined, code-consumed); socialLinks is a present-but-empty object {}
zero webcam documents exist while the /webcams page carries a live webcamGrid block (renders an empty grid behind the password gate)
service.sticker/tabImage/tabCta unset on all 4 services (their only consumer, serviceTabs, is unused live)

one internal link stored as external-style href: daycare hero secondaryCta {linkType:'href', href:'/pricing#boarding'} — bypasses the page-reference model (also relies on fragment deep-linking into pricingPageTabs)
unlike hound-3, NO dual-value/stale link objects found — every live link has exactly one populated branch matching its linkType
system/tooling docs present: sanity.previewUrlSecret, system.schema/group/retention — do not migrate

riskFlags.flag: Settings singleton identity mismatch: the only settings doc is at a UUID, but studio structure (documentId 'siteSettings') and both presentation-tool configs (mainDocuments '/' filter _id == 'siteSettings') expect 'siteSettings'. Editors opening Studio 'Site Settings' get an EMPTY document; saving it would create a second settings doc and *[_type=='settings'][0] ordering would decide which one the site renders. scripts/migrate-settings-id.js exists, unrun. Migration must target the UUID doc and should fix or sidestep this identity.

Nav 'Services' injection is inert: layout.tsx replaces dropdown children only when a nav item's label is exactly 'Services', but the live label is 'Services and Pricing' (renamed in client Round 2). The dropdown now comes from CMS-authored children. servicesNavQuery still runs on every request for nothing. The adapter must reproduce the CMS-children path, not the injection; a future rename back to 'Services' would silently change behavior.

Pricing exists in two unconnected sources: hardcoded frontend/app/data/pricingData.ts (drives all calculators) and CMS pricingTable/pricingPageTabs content (drives displayed tables). Already bitten twice on this site: boarding $39 additional-dog rate (Round 2) and exit-bath $49/$59/$69/$89 (Round 4) each required paired code + CMS edits.

Deep coupling to Sanity visual-editing runtime: defineLive/sanityFetch on every fetch, stega + stegaClean() in 27 component files, useOptimistic reconciliation in PageBuilder, dataAttr overlays in BlockRenderer, presentation tool in two configs. Same surface as hound-3 plus ExpandingCardsRow.
riskFlags.evidence: frontend/sanity/lib/live.ts, frontend/app/components/PageBuilder.tsx, BlockRenderer.tsx, grep stegaClean → 27 files

riskFlags.flag: Doubled title suffix on every page: seo.metaTitle values already end in '| Home Away From Home' AND feed the layout title template '%s | Home Away From Home' → rendered titles like 'Pricing | Home Away From Home | Home Away From Home'. Fix data or template at migration.

Organization JSON-LD ships a raw asset._ref as its logo URL on every page — LIVE here (settings.logo is set), unlike hound-3 where it was latent. Companion latent bug: LocalBusiness image only set when ogImage exists but reads logo._ref (layout.tsx:84-89).

Site-wide SEO defaults are hollow: settings.description, ogImage, favicon, googleSiteVerification all unset → empty default meta description, no OG image anywhere (no page-level ogImage either), favicon from app/icon.svg only.

PT link annotations would silently not render in 5 of 7 render sites (bare <PortableText> without components map: SplitContent, FaqAccordion, FeatureList, ContentColumns, ContactForm). Currently benign — live PT contains zero links and zero inline images — but any editor adding a link today gets plain text. Unify the renderer in embark-os.
riskFlags.evidence: frontend/app/components/sections/SplitContent.tsx, FaqAccordion.tsx, FeatureList.tsx, ContentColumns.tsx, ContactForm.tsx vs frontend/app/components/PortableText.tsx

riskFlags.flag: Cross-site content leakage in code: HeroMarquee.tsx alt fallbacks 'Boxers Bed & Biscuits' / 'Boxers facility' (backported from the Boxers build; fires only when CMS alt/logo unset — heroLogo is unset live, but the marquee images all have alts so nothing leaks user-visibly today). Root package.json is still named 'hound-3'. Violates the repo's own no-sister-site-references rule.

Image pipeline to reproduce exactly: sanity-image srcset/auto-format at 20 distinct widths incl. crop+hotspot; 1200x627 fit=crop OG; 1600w lightbox with natural dimensions parsed from the asset _ref filename pattern /-(\d+)x(\d+)-/ — breaks if new CMS asset IDs don't encode dimensions.

Build pipeline depends on Sanity typegen: predev/prebuild run `sanity schema extract --enforce-required-fields` + `sanity typegen generate`; component prop types derive from GROQ result types (sanity.types.ts, ExtractPageBuilderType). Embark-os needs an equivalent type story for 44 block shapes.

Two divergent PT link-annotation shapes + a third standalone link shape flow through one resolver (blockContent {linkType,href,page→page-only, init 'href'}; blockContentTextOnly default {href}; link object {linkType,href,page→page|service,queryString}, no init). linkResolver backfills linkType='href' (utils.ts:35-37). Normalize to one shape on migration.

Webcams page is live at /webcams (heroMinimal + webcamGrid + ctaBanner, seo populated, in sitemap) with ZERO webcam docs — password gate leads to an empty grid. Decide: seed webcams, or noIndex/remove before or during migration.
Studio insert-menu thumbnails: only 2 of 44 block thumbnails exist (callToAction, infoSection) — 42 broken preview images in the page-builder grid view. Cosmetic, Studio-only.

studio/sanity.config.ts still carries hound-3/template leftovers: 'post' route + locations for a type that doesn't exist; frontend/sanity.config.ts was cleaned up (has service routes) — the two Studio configs have drifted from each other.
blockContent inline image member has no alt field but renderer reads value.alt — inline PT images can never have alt text as schema'd. (No inline PT images in live data.)

Dead fields to drop, not migrate: featureCards.darkMode, webcamPreview.webcamUrl, testimonials.googleReviewCount, settings.tagline, settings.yearEstablished, galleryShowcase.images[].caption, service.sticker/tabImage/tabCta (dead-in-practice here), service.heading (fallback never fires); 21 of 44 block types have zero live usage.

Misc: internal deep link stored as href '/pricing#boarding' (fragment routing into pricingPageTabs tabs); Spacer sizes sm and md render identically (both h-16); booking platform in live data is Goose (booking.goose.pet) while project docs say Gingr; the three-theme system described in context/ docs does not exist in code (single palette in globals.css, no ThemeToggle) — docs are stale, not the code.
